city.title: Portland, Maine
city.extract: Portland is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Maine. Its population was 68,408 at the 2020 census. The Greater Portland metropolitan area has a population of approximately 550,000 people, the most populous metropolitan area in Maine. It is the county seat of Cumberland County. Historically tied to commercial shipping, the marine economy, and light industry, Portland's economy in the 21st century relies mostly on the service sector. The Port of Portland is the second-largest tonnage seaport in the New England area as of 2019.

outreach.subject: When the pipe bursts
outreach.message:
Your team is no stranger to 4 feet of snow and ~185 rainy days per year, which means maintenance issues are a constant concern. This climate creates a heavy maintenance load, leaving your team to react to issues rather than prevent them. Your building requires a lot of upkeep just to keep up with the elements. 

 At Moonlight Properties, a burst pipe during a cold snap can quickly turn into a flooded lobby and a slew of resident calls, all wondering when someone will show up to fix the problem. EliseAI keeps residents informed automatically so your team can focus on the fix, not the calls. 

 Worth a call?
